infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stella Gold needs access to your photo library so you can select and upload jewelry product images when adding or editing products in the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Stella Gold may save edited or uploaded jewelry product images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Users can take photos of jewelry and products directly inside the Stella Gold app.
